entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH, BECOMING WEST AFTER MIDNIGHT
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
MUCH COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST 15 TO 20 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, DIMINISHING TO AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS AROUND 80

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
